description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image and a MIX_ENV variable set to test. Define three stages: setup, build, and test. In the setup stage add a get-dependencies job that runs `make deps` and stores the `deps` directory and `mix.lock` file as artifacts that expire after 30 minutes. In the build stage add a compile job that runs `make compile`. In the test stage add a tests job that runs `make lint` then `make test` and captures test coverage using the regex `/\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+)%/`.
